info.name: Advertiser Reports
info.description:
Advertiser campaign reports endpoint.

A single endpoint `GET {{baseUrl}}/reports/advertiser` returns the authenticated advertiser's completed/discarded campaign reports plus aggregate statistics.

All filters are passed as query string params. If `page` and `limit` are both omitted, the endpoint returns ALL records for the advertiser. Otherwise, it paginates.

The Login request stores `accessToken` as a collection variable; the report request authenticates with `{{accessToken}}` via Bearer auth.

exec: const token = res.accessToken || res.access_token || (res.data && (res.data.accessToken || res.data.access_token)) || res.token;
console.warn('No access token found in login response. Inspect the response body and set {{accessToken}} manually.');

query.description: Optional. Page number (>= 1). If omitted along with `limit`, the endpoint returns ALL records (no pagination).
Optional. Page size (>= 1). If omitted along with `page`, the endpoint returns ALL records (no pagination).
Optional, repeatable. Report status filter. Allowed values: `completed`, `discarded`. Repeat the key to pass multiple values, e.g. `statuses=completed&statuses=discarded`.
Second value for the `statuses` filter (repeat the key to pass an array).
Optional, repeatable. Filter by category UUID(s). Repeat the key for multiple categories — a report matches if it has at least one of the supplied categories.
Optional, repeatable. Target platform filter. Allowed values: `youtube`, `tiktok`, `facebook`, `instagram`, `x`. A report matches if its `includedPlatforms` intersects the supplied set.
Second value for the `platforms` filter (repeat the key to pass an array).
Optional, repeatable. Content type filter. Allowed values: `story`, `reel`, `post`, `youtube_video`, `all`. A report matches if its `contentTypes` intersects the supplied set.
Second value for the `contentTypes` filter (repeat the key to pass an array).
Optional. Minimum actual paid amount (inclusive). Number, >= 0.
Optional. Maximum actual paid amount (inclusive). Number, >= 0.
Optional. Free-text search. Matches the campaign name (case-insensitive `LIKE`); if the value is purely numeric, also matches the campaign number exactly.

request.description:
Returns the authenticated advertiser's campaign reports.

Response shape:
```
{
  data: [
    {
      id, campaignId, campaignNumber, campaignName,
      status,                       // 'completed' | 'discarded'
      campaignVisibility,           // 'public' | 'private' | null
      categories: [{ id, name }],
      includedPlatforms: string[] | null,
      contentTypes: string[] | null,
      acceptedSubmissionsInfluencersCount,
      actualPaid,
      startDate, endDate, applicationDeadlineDate,
      submittedAt, approvedAt, createdAt
    }
  ],
  statistics: {
    totalPaid,                  // from advertiser wallet
    completedCampaignsCount,
    discardedCampaignsCount,
    totalCampaignsCount
  },
  pagination: { total, page, limit }   // page/limit are null when no pagination was requested
}
```

All query parameters are optional and can be combined freely. To disable a parameter, toggle it off in Postman's Params tab (it will become `disabled: true`).
